name: @tessera-collective/user-registration
description: FLOW-01 user-registration — tessera-collective tenant fork. Email-based intake, uniqueness verification, credential hashing, idempotent account creation, email verification, and onboarding-material delivery. Fresh root install at platform v1.0.0 (NOT in the acme→northwind cascade). Zero FREEDOM-config overrides — tessera tenant context returns the platform v1.0.0 defaults under their AsyncLocalStorage scope. Repository exists for V-14 instance C evidence (third-party-tenant repo provisioning) and V-13 instance D drift verification.
coInstallNotes: Fresh root install from platform-source (no cascade hops). FLOW-01 stands alone for its 3 services (T47-T49). Downstream flows (FLOW-02, FLOW-08, FLOW-48) consume FLOW-01 events but are NOT required for FLOW-01 to boot. Circular co-install runtime test: server/test/user-registration/phase-01-circular-install.spec.ts proves FLOW-01 services boot standalone.

adaptationProvenance.adaptationMethod: Fresh root install — no FREEDOM overrides applied; tenant exists for V-13(D) Phase 5c third-party tenant separation confirmation
adaptationProvenance.verificationContract: server/test/user-registration/phase-01-adaptation-freedom-config.spec.ts (FC-ADAPT-1 default-fallback case covers tessera by construction)

cascadeLineage.introduces: Fresh root install with zero FREEDOM overrides; third-party tenant for V-13(D) cross-tenant separation confirmation; deliberately not part of the acme→northwind cascade

v13InstanceD.purpose: Third-tenant cascade-coherence confirmation — proves a tenant OUTSIDE the acme→northwind cascade installs FLOW-01 cleanly and renders pixel-identical to platform-source baseline (because their adaptation surface is empty)
v13InstanceD.isolationFromCascade: tessera-collective is not in the acme→northwind cascade chain; their FREEDOM context contains no inherited overrides from acme; AsyncLocalStorage scope correctly isolates tessera from acme/northwind tenant contexts
v13InstanceD.crossTenantIsolationDeferred: V-16 cross-tenant JWT isolation tests fire at Phase C9 (cascade row 10) with three pairs (A↔B, B↔C, A↔C); this row 9 audit only certifies that tessera's repo provisioning + UI surface are correctly bounded
